# OneWayTaxi.ai

> OneWayTaxi.ai is the leading one-way drop taxi service across South India, covering 120+ cities in Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Karnataka, and Pondicherry. We charge only for the one-way distance — no return fare — saving customers up to 40% compared to traditional round-trip taxi services.

## Key Facts

- Service: One-way (drop) taxi, outstation cabs, airport taxi
- Coverage: 120+ cities across 6 South Indian states
- Starting fare: ₹13/km (Hatchback), ₹14/km (Sedan), ₹19/km (SUV), ₹22/km (Innova Crysta)
- Availability: 24/7, 365 days
- All fares include: Driver bata, toll charges, inter-state permits, GST
- No hidden charges, no surge pricing
- Phone: +91 81244 76010
- Website: https://onewaytaxi.ai

## Popular Routes

- Chennai to Bangalore: 346 km, from ₹4,850
- Chennai to Pondicherry: 150 km, from ₹2,100
- Chennai to Coimbatore: 505 km, from ₹7,070
- Bangalore to Mysore: 150 km, from ₹2,100
- Kochi to Munnar: 130 km, from ₹1,820
- Madurai to Rameswaram: 174 km, from ₹2,436
- Hyderabad to Bangalore: 570 km, from ₹7,980
- Coimbatore to Ooty: 86 km, from ₹1,200

## Vehicle Types

- Mini/Hatchback: 4 seats, ₹13/km
- Sedan (Swift Dzire/Etios): 4 seats, ₹14/km
- SUV: 7-8 seats, ₹19/km
- Innova: 7 seats, ₹20/km
- Innova Crysta: 7 seats, ₹22/km

## States Covered

- Tamil Nadu: 38 districts
- Kerala: 14 districts
- Andhra Pradesh: 26 districts
- Telangana: 33 districts
- Karnataka: Bangalore, Mysore, Mangalore
- Pondicherry: 4 districts

## How It Works

1. Enter pickup city, drop city, date and time
2. Get instant fare estimate
3. Confirm booking — driver assigned
4. Travel comfortably — pay at destination
